name: STACKED BAR 100%

meta.data_required: ordered categories + 2 to 4 additive segments; totals normalized away

use_when: how the MIX shifts across periods or categories
the key segment's share is the message
not_when: the total matters (use CH-PTW-01; 100% hides growth and shrinkage)
single-period share (a sentence or CH-PTW-06 does it better)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the share shift with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: percent, implied; share labels carry the % sign
data_shape.series: array of {name, values[]}, first series is the KEY segment whose share is labeled

scale.note: every column normalized to full height; key segment share labeled above

rules: all columns equal height; the mix is the message
the key (first) segment's share labeled above each column with the % sign
segments identified by swatch + name at the last column, never a legend
the title must state the share shift, not the totals
anti_patterns: using 100% stacked when totals shrink (it hides decline)
labeling every segment share (label the key segment only)
qa: segment names at last column, no legend
